# lockr

> lockr is a cross-platform CLI tool that locks and unlocks folders from the terminal. Two modes: hide (instant, renames and hides folder with OS attributes) and encrypt (AES-256-GCM, compresses and encrypts into a .vault binary file). Built with Node.js/TypeScript, uses Commander for CLI, Inquirer for interactive prompts. Replaces FolderGuard.

lockr is written in TypeScript (ESM modules), built with tsup, and runs on Node.js >= 18. The CLI entry point is `src/index.ts` which dispatches to either interactive mode (no args) or Commander subcommands (lock, unlock, open, status, list). The project uses pnpm as package manager.

Hide mode renames the folder to `.lockr-<random>` in the same parent directory and applies OS-specific hidden attributes (Windows: `attrib +h +s`, macOS: `chflags hidden`, Linux: dot-prefix). A 3-level fallback handles Windows EBUSY errors: direct rename → retry after 500ms → move contents individually. Password hash (scrypt) is stored in a JSON registry at `%APPDATA%\lockr\registry.json` (Windows) or `~/.lockr/registry.json` (macOS) or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/lockr/registry.json` (Linux).

Encrypt mode compresses the folder with tar+gzip, encrypts with AES-256-GCM (scrypt key derivation, N=2^17, r=8, p=1), writes a binary .vault file (magic: LKVT), then securely deletes originals (2-pass overwrite). The vault format has a fixed header (magic, version, salt, IV, auth tag, original size, timestamp, metadata length) followed by JSON metadata (unencrypted) and the encrypted payload.

Currently tested on Windows 11 only. macOS and Linux support is implemented but untested.

## Source Code

- [src/index.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/index.ts): CLI entry point — interactive mode (no args) or Commander subcommands
- [src/types.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/types.ts): Constants (vault magic, crypto params), interfaces (VaultMetadata, VaultHeader, RegistryEntry, Registry, FolderStats)
- [src/commands/lock.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/commands/lock.ts): Lock command — dispatches to lockHide() or lockEncrypt() based on --encrypt flag
- [src/commands/unlock.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/commands/unlock.ts): Unlock command — auto-detects mode from registry, handles hide and encrypt, supports direct vault unlock
- [src/commands/open.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/commands/open.ts): Open command — unlock, open in file explorer, wait for Enter, relock with same password
- [src/commands/status.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/commands/status.ts): Status command — checks registry and vault files
- [src/commands/list.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/commands/list.ts): List command — shows all locked folders, supports --json
- [src/commands/interactive.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/commands/interactive.ts): Interactive mode — guided menu with Inquirer select/input/password prompts
- [src/core/hide.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/core/hide.ts): Hide mode logic — hideFolder() with 3-level EBUSY fallback, unhideFolder(), moveContents(), generateHiddenName()
- [src/core/crypto.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/core/crypto.ts): Crypto — deriveKey (scrypt), encryptBuffer/decryptBuffer (AES-256-GCM), secureDelete (2-pass overwrite), secureDeleteFolder
- [src/core/archive.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/core/archive.ts): Archive — compressFolder (tar.gz), extractArchive, getFolderStats (recursive walk)
- [src/core/vault.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/core/vault.ts): Vault binary format — writeVault, readVaultHeader, readVaultPayload
- [src/utils/platform.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/utils/platform.ts): Platform detection — hideWithOsAttributes, unhideWithOsAttributes, openInExplorer (win32/darwin/linux)
- [src/utils/password.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/utils/password.ts): Password prompts — promptPassword, promptPasswordWithConfirm (3 retries), promptPasswordWithRetry, hashPassword, verifyPassword
- [src/utils/config.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/utils/config.ts): Registry — getConfigDir (per-OS), loadRegistry, saveRegistry, addEntry, removeEntry, findEntry, updateEntryStatus
- [src/utils/ui.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/src/utils/ui.ts): UI helpers — ASCII banner, createSpinner (ora), formatSize, success/error/warn/info chalk helpers

## Documentation

- [README.md](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/README.md): Full documentation — installation, commands, security model, vault format, cryptographic parameters, threat model, FAQ
- [tests/windows-scenarios.md](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/tests/windows-scenarios.md): 123 Windows test scenarios covering paths, hide/encrypt modes, CWD locks, corruption, interruptions, edge cases

## Configuration

- [package.json](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/package.json): Node.js project config — bin: lockr, type: module, dependencies (commander, chalk, ora, tar, @inquirer/prompts)
- [tsconfig.json](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/tsconfig.json): TypeScript config — strict, ES2022, ESNext modules, bundler resolution
- [tsup.config.ts](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/tsup.config.ts): Build config — ESM, node18 target, shebang banner

## Optional

- [.gitignore](https://github.com/kevinbarfleur/lockr/blob/main/.gitignore): Ignores node_modules/, dist/, *.tgz
